description: A drum of hazardous waste from a production clean-out needs to be prepared for shipment to a licensed disposal facility.

nodes.task_description: Identify the waste stream profile for the material in the drum.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the waste stream code and its characteristics.

nodes.task_description: Generate the required hazardous waste manifest for the shipment, including the EPA waste codes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a compliant waste manifest document.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a pickup with an approved hazardous waste transportation company.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books a pickup and records the confirmation number.
